plugin.name: Psionicist_Highest_Spell
plugin.author: Dunnaakr
plugin.purpose: Auto highest psionicist spells with manual + auto level support

muclient.script:
local player_level = 1
-- ====================== SINGLE TARGET SPELLS ====================== local single_target_spells = { {lvl = 1, cast = 101, name = "Ballistic attack"}, {lvl = 7, cast = 127, name = "Mind thrust"}, {lvl = 9, cast = 131, name = "Psychic drain"}, {lvl = 12, cast = 115, name = "Ego whip"}, {lvl = 15, cast = 98, name = "Agitation"}, {lvl = 21, cast = 122, name = "Inflict pain"}, {lvl = 25, cast = 196, name = "Telekinesis"}, {lvl = 31, cast = 353, name = "Mind freeze"}, {lvl = 34, cast = 107, name = "Control flames"}, {lvl = 39, cast = 355, name = "Nerve shock"}, {lvl = 43, cast = 130, name = "Psychic crush"}, {lvl = 49, cast = 294, name = "Cause decay"}, {lvl = 55, cast = 200, name = "Acidic touch"}, {lvl = 60, cast = 354, name = "Neural burn"}, {lvl = 65, cast = 128, name = "Project force"}, {lvl = 74, cast = 129, name = "Psionic blast"}, {lvl = 86, cast = 110, name = "Detonate"}, {lvl = 94, cast = 357, name = "Trauma"}, {lvl = 108, cast = 356, name = "Psychosis"}, {lvl = 117, cast = 357, name = "Spasm"}, {lvl = 124, cast = 359, name = "Nightmare touch"}, {lvl = 136, cast = 233, name = "Megablast"}, {lvl = 151, cast = 360, name = "Neural overload"}, {lvl = 164, cast = 234, name = "Pyromania"}, {lvl = 179, cast = 362, name = "Desolation"}, }
-- ====================== AOE SPELLS ====================== local aoe_spells = { {lvl = 73, cast = 136, name = "Ultrablast"}, {lvl = 99, cast = 109, name = "Death field"}, }
local function get_highest_spell(spell_list, level) local best = nil for _, spell in ipairs(spell_list) do if spell.lvl <= level then if not best or spell.lvl > best.lvl then best = spell end end end return best end
local function show_spell_list(spell_list, title, color) ColourNote("white", "", "") ColourNote(color or "cyan", "", "=== " .. title .. " ===") ColourNote("white", "", "Lvl | Cast# | Spell Name") ColourNote("white", "", string.rep("-", 45))
for _, spell in ipairs(spell_list) do local status = (spell.lvl <= player_level) and "✓" or "✗" ColourNote("white", "", string.format("%3d | %4d | %s %s", spell.lvl, spell.cast, status, spell.name)) end ColourNote("yellow", "", "Current Level: " .. player_level) ColourNote("white", "", "") end
-- Now allows setting level higher OR lower function update_player_level(new_level) new_level = tonumber(new_level) if not new_level or new_level < 1 then ColourNote("red", "", "[Error] Invalid level") return end
if new_level ~= player_level then local old = player_level player_level = new_level ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "[Level Set] " .. old .. " → " .. new_level) end end
-- ====================== COMMANDS ====================== function hspell_command(name, line, wildcards) local arg = wildcards[1] and string.lower(trim(wildcards[1])) or ""
if arg == "list" or arg == "l" then show_spell_list(single_target_spells, "Primary Psionicist Single Target Spells", "cyan") return end
-- Manual level set (any number) if arg:match("^%d+$") then update_player_level(arg) return end
-- Normal cast local spell = get_highest_spell(single_target_spells, player_level) if spell then SendNoEcho("cast " .. spell.cast) ColourNote("cyan", "", "[HSpell] Casting #" .. spell.cast .. " → " .. spell.name .. " (Lvl " .. spell.lvl .. ")") end end
function haoe_command(name, line, wildcards) local arg = wildcards[1] and string.lower(trim(wildcards[1])) or ""
if arg == "list" or arg == "l" then show_spell_list(aoe_spells, "Primary Psionicist AOE Spells", "magenta") return end
local spell = get_highest_spell(aoe_spells, player_level) if spell then SendNoEcho("cast " .. spell.cast) ColourNote("magenta", "", "[HAoE] Casting #" .. spell.cast .. " → " .. spell.name .. " (Lvl " .. spell.lvl .. ")") end end
function trim(s) return (s or ""):match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") end
-- ====================== AUTO LEVEL DETECTION ======================
function OnLevelUp(name, line, wildcards) update_player_level(wildcards[1]) end
function OnScoreLevel(name, line, wildcards) update_player_level(wildcards[1]) end
function OnPluginInstall() ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "[Psionicist Helper] v1.4 loaded!") ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", " Commands:") ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", " hspell → cast best spell") ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", " hspell list → show all spells") ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", " hspell 154 → set your level manually (any number)")
-- Level-up trigger AddTrigger("level_up_trigger", "^You advance to level (\\d+)!.*$", "", 1, 12, 0, "", "OnLevelUp", 1)
-- Score trigger AddTrigger("score_level_trigger", "^You are a .* level (\\d+) .*$", "", 1, 12, 0, "", "OnScoreLevel", 1)
-- Try to get current level automatically DoAfterSpecial(2, "SendNoEcho('score')", sendto.script) end
function OnPluginClose() DeleteTrigger("level_up_trigger") DeleteTrigger("score_level_trigger") end
